commands.author: Pandah97

target.title: #92684 fix(doctor): skip empty parent groupAllowFrom warning when all accounts override
target.body:
## Summary

`openclaw doctor` warns about an empty top-level `groupAllowFrom` even when every child account has its own populated `groupAllowFrom`. The runtime resolves `account ?? parent`, so the parent's empty list is never read ŌĆö the warning is a false positive.

**Root cause:** `scanEmptyAllowlistPolicyWarnings()` checks the parent channel config independently of its child accounts. When the parent's `groupPolicy` is `"allowlist"` but `groupAllowFrom` is empty, it warns ŌĆö without checking whether every account under it already supplies its own list.

**Fix:** Before emitting the parent-level group-allowlist warning, check whether **all** child accounts have their own populated `groupAllowFrom`. If they do, skip the parent warning (the parent scope is just a fallback that's never reached). DM-policy warnings at the parent scope are preserved.

## Real behavior proof

**Behavior or issue addressed:** `openclaw doctor` false-positive warning when top-level `groupAllowFrom` is empty but every account overrides it with its own populated list.

**Real environment tested:** Linux 4.19.112, Node.js v24.13.1 via tsx, openclaw workspace importing the production `scanEmptyAllowlistPolicyWarnings` module.

**Exact steps or command run after this patch:**
```
$ npx tsx repro-92684.ts

=== Test 1: All accounts override parent groupAllowFrom (no false warning) ===
Warnings: []
No false warning: PASS

=== Test 2: Some accounts lack groupAllowFrom (should still warn) ===
Warnings: ["- channels.signal.groupPolicy is ..."]
Has parent warning: PASS

=== Test 3: DM policy warnings preserved ===
Warnings: ["- channels.signal.dmPolicy is ..."]
DM warning preserved: PASS
```

**Evidence after fix:**
```
Test 1 ŌĆö all accounts override ŌåÆ no false warning:          PASS
Test 2 ŌĆö some accounts lack ŌåÆ parent warning preserved:     PASS
Test 3 ŌĆö DM warnings untouched by the change:               PASS
```

**Observed result after fix:** Parent-level group-allowlist warning is suppressed when every child account carries its own populated `groupAllowFrom`. DM-policy warnings at the parent scope continue to fire. When even one account lacks its own list, the parent warning is preserved.

**What was not tested:** Integration with specific channel plugins (signal, telegram, discord, etc.). The fix operates at the shared `scanEmptyAllowlistPolicyWarnings` layer before plugin-specific hooks fire, so it applies uniformly.

## Test plan

- [x] `pnpm vitest run src/commands/doctor/shared/empty-allowlist-scan.test.ts` ŌĆö 5 passed
- [x] `pnpm vitest run src/commands/doctor/shared/empty-allowlist-policy.test.ts` ŌĆö 4 passed
- [x] Regression: empty parent + all accounts override ŌåÆ no warning
- [x] Regression: empty parent + some accounts lack ŌåÆ warning preserved
- [x] Regression: DM warnings preserved at parent scope
